title: Provide physical T-Deck revision and bootloader access evidence
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.13 cannot confirm the local LilyGO T-Deck revision or bootloader path from the current host state. On 2026-06-30 the Mac only exposed /dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG, identified by IOKit as FTDI FT232R USB UART serial A704ESXG; esptool.py --port /dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG --baud 115200 --connect-attempts 1 chip_id failed with Invalid head of packet (0x00), so no ESP32-S3 identity, USB VID/PID, board marking, or boot log was captured. What needs to be done: connect the physical T-Deck over its ESP32-S3 USB/serial path or provide board photos/markings plus bootloader/serial logs. Acceptance criteria: exact T-Deck/Plus/Pro revision is recorded, USB VID/PID or serial adapter path is recorded, esptool chip_id/flash_id or boot log identifies ESP32-S3 access, and any board-revision mismatch creates a separate board-target follow-up.
notes: Blocked for this no-hardware execution loop (2026-07-01): acceptance requires physical hardware, real RF/BLE capture, logic-analyzer/scope evidence, board flashing, or partner-provided physical logs. No local physical radios/boards/phones/captures are available. Leave blocked until hardware/evidence is available; software-only prerequisites should be tracked in separate dependent Beads.
